subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate you taking the time to explore a potential collaboration between our teams.

I'm happy to schedule an introductory call. Would you be available this week? Please feel free to suggest a couple of time slots that work for you and I'll do my best to coordinate.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those externally, as they contain sensitive internal information. However, I'd be glad to facilitate an introduction through the appropriate channels if that would be helpful. Please let me know what you're hoping to achieve and I'll do my best to point you in the right direction.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
